money_appropriated: This bill appropriates $3,221,400 in operating and capital budgets for fiscal year 2019, including:<hr><ltbullet>$1,165,600 from the General Fund;<hr><ltbullet>$295,800 from the Education Fund;<hr><ltbullet>$1,760,000 from various sources as detailed in this bill. This bill appropriates $64,200 in expendable funds and accounts for fiscal year 2019. This bill appropriates $300 in business-like activities for fiscal year 2019. This bill appropriates $14,500 in restricted fund and account transfers for fiscal year 2019, all of which is from the General Fund. This bill appropriates $1,000 in fiduciary funds for fiscal year 2019.
